html:
Stanbic IBTC – Africa NXT Sponsorship Event

“L-R: John Okhueleigbe, Head, Micro Pensions, Stanbic IBTC Pension Managers Limited; Wunmi- Ehis Uzenabor, Executive Director, Operations, Stanbic IBTC Asset Management Limited; Wole Adeniyi, Chief Executive, Stanbic IBTC Bank PLC and Bunmi Olarinoye, Executive Director, Stanbic IBTC Stockbrokers during the Africa NXT event which took place recently in Lagos.”
